summary: Iteration 16: Verified rich text editor, professional PDF output formatting, visual template switcher, font size controls, and bulk currency update. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All new features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/resume/upload - Accepts PDF files with text content
Backend: POST /api/resume/upload - Rejects invalid file formats with 400
Backend: POST /api/resume/analyze - Returns overall_score and ats_score
Backend: POST /api/resume/improve - Returns improved_text for rich editor
Backend: PUT /api/products/bulk-currency - Updates all products currency
Backend: PUT /api/products/bulk-currency - Rejects invalid currency codes
Backend: PUT /api/products/bulk-currency - Requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/products - Returns products list
Backend: GET /api/ - Root endpoint returns API info
Backend: GET /api/resume/pricing - Returns pricing info
Backend: GET /api/resume/templates - Returns 5 templates
UI: Resume Optimizer page loads at /resume-optimizer
UI: Upload → Analysis → Optimize → Download flow works end-to-end
UI: Rich text editor appears when clicking 'Edit Text' on step 4
UI: Editor toolbar has all 8 buttons (Bold, Italic, Underline, Heading, Bullet list, Divider, Undo, Redo)
UI: Font size controls (A-/13/A+) visible on results step
UI: Visual template switcher shows 5 templates (Classic, Modern, Executive, Minimal, Bold)
UI: Resume preview renders with bold section headings (uppercase, letter-spacing)
UI: Resume preview shows proper bullet points (disc bullets)
UI: Admin settings page has 'Bulk Currency Update' section
UI: Bulk currency dropdown shows EUR/USD/GBP/INR/AED/AUD/CAD/SGD/CHF options
UI: 'Update All Products' button visible for bulk currency update
critical_code_review_comments: RichEditor.jsx uses deprecated document.execCommand API but it's functional in all browsers
RichEditor properly converts plain text to HTML on mount (uppercase headers → h2, bullet lines → li)
ResumePreview handles both HTML content (from editor) and plain text (fallback) correctly
PDF download (handleDownloadPDF) creates professional output with template-specific styling
Bulk currency endpoint correctly placed before /products/{product_id} to avoid FastAPI path conflict
All data-testid attributes properly added for toolbar buttons and controls
seed_data_creation: Created test PDF at /tmp/test_resume_real.pdf with JOHN DOE resume content
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rich text editor works via contenteditable + execCommand. Editor outputs HTML that ResumePreview renders via dangerouslySetInnerHTML. PDF download handles both HTML and plain text content - builds styled HTML page and triggers print dialog. Bulk currency update requires admin auth and validates currency codes against whitelist (EUR/USD/GBP/INR/AED/AUD/CAD/SGD/CHF). Visual templates switch preview styling instantly. Font controls adjust 10-18px range.

features_verified.pdf_output_formatting: WORKING - Professional output with bold headings, proper bullets, template-specific accents
features_verified.visual_template_switcher: WORKING - 5 templates (Classic, Modern, Executive, Minimal, Bold)
features_verified.bulk_currency_update: WORKING - Admin dropdown + Update All Products button
features_verified.resume_upload_analyze: WORKING - Full flow from upload to analysis to improve
